title: “He’s texting some hot actress”: Candace Owens reacts after Brigitte Macron slap claims shock France again
summary_full: Candace Owens reacted after a new book claimed Brigitte Macron slapped Emmanuel Macron over alleged messages to actress Golshifteh Farahani. The French first lady has denied the claims, while Farahani also rejected relationship rumors. The controversy comes as Owens continues fighting a defamation lawsuit filed by the French first couple over her past comments and online series.
